message: docs: remind to restart relay in tmux after code changes

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+# Agent Notes
+
+- Whenever you make code changes, if the relay is running (check tmux), restart it so the new code is loaded. For this repo the session is `warelay-relay`; kill and start `pnpm warelay relay --verbose` in tmux.
